data.current_description: Returns a list of all tags used to categorize quotes.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all tags used to categorize quotes in the database. Supports pagination parameters to control the number of results and offset. Each tag object includes the tag name, quote count, and other metadata. Useful for browsing available quote categories or populating tag filters.

data.current_description: Returns a paginated list of all quotes. Supports filtering and sorting.
